---
title: "GPP_Event_Analysis"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

```{R}
library(arrow)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(slider)
```

## Data preparation
Read in data files
```{R}
df_all_stations <- read_parquet("../data/data_fdk_parquet/fdk_forest_15years.parquet")
```

Filter out sites in koeppen climate codes D and C with cold winters.
```{R}
df_site_info <- read_csv("../data/fdk_site_info.csv")
df_climate_info <- df_site_info |>
  rename("site_id" = sitename) |>
  select(site_id, koeppen_code)
df_sites <- df_all_stations |>
  inner_join(df_climate_info) |>
  filter(koeppen_code %in% c(
      "Cfb", "Cfc",
      "Dfa", "Dfb", "Dfc", "Dfd",
      "Dwa", "Dwb", "Dwc", "Dwd"
    ))
```

**Data quality assessment:**

No quality control variable for `GPP_NT_VUT_REF` and `GPP_DT_VUT_REF` are available. But since these two variables are derived from `NEE_VUT_REF` the control variable `NEE_VUT_REF_QC` is used to filter out GPP recordings of insufficient quality. 
```{R}
df_sites <- df_sites |>
  mutate(
    GPP_DT_clean = if_else(NEE_VUT_REF_QC > 0, GPP_DT_VUT_REF, NA_real_),
    GPP_NT_clean = if_else(NEE_VUT_REF_QC > 0, GPP_NT_VUT_REF, NA_real_)
  )
```

**Calculate running trailing mean:**

```{R}
df_sites <- df_sites %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(TIMESTAMP),
    year = year(date),
    DOY = yday(date)
  ) %>%
  group_by(site_id) %>%
  arrange(date, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    GPP_DT_trailing_4d = slider::slide_dbl(
      GPP_DT_clean,
      ~ if (sum(!is.na(.x)) >= 3) mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
      .before = 3,
      .complete = TRUE
    ),
    GPP_NT_trailing_4d = slider::slide_dbl(
      GPP_NT_clean,
      ~ if (sum(!is.na(.x)) >= 3) mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
      .before = 3,
      .complete = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

### Definition of Threshold for SOS
To define the SOS we first calculate the maximum GPP and minimum GPP per site over the entire period of recordings. Then in a next step we define a threshold for the SOS as follows:
$$
Threshold_{SOS} = GPP_{min} + 0.15 \times (GPP_{max} - GPP_{min})
$$

Calculate maximum and minimum GPP recordings:
```{R}
# set negative values to 0, because biologically values below 0 do not make sense and negative values cause issues when calculating SOS threshold
df_sites <- df_sites %>%
  mutate(
    GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos = if_else(GPP_DT_trailing_4d < 0, 0, GPP_DT_trailing_4d),
    GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos = if_else(GPP_NT_trailing_4d < 0, 0, GPP_NT_trailing_4d)
  )

gpp_site_amp <- df_sites %>%
  group_by(site_id) %>%
  summarise(
    GPP_DT_site_max = max(GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos, na.rm = TRUE),
    GPP_DT_site_min = min(GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos, na.rm = TRUE),
    GPP_NT_site_max = max(GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos, na.rm = TRUE),
    GPP_NT_site_min = min(GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

Calculate SOS threshold:
```{R}
gpp_site_amp <- gpp_site_amp %>%
  mutate(
    GPP_DT_SOS_threshold = GPP_DT_site_min + 0.15 * (GPP_DT_site_max - GPP_DT_site_min),
    GPP_NT_SOS_threshold = GPP_NT_site_min + 0.15 * (GPP_NT_site_max - GPP_NT_site_min)
  )

# combine threshold with sites data set
df_sites <- df_sites %>%
  left_join(gpp_site_amp, by = c("site_id"))
```

Identify frost events after SOS:
```{R}
source("../R/GPP_Frost_Events.R")
```

```{R}
gpp_events_DT <- find_frost_gpp(df_sites, partition = "DT")
gpp_events_NT <- find_frost_gpp(df_sites, partition = "NT")

events_DT <- gpp_events_DT$events
events_NT <- gpp_events_NT$events

df_DT_with_events <- gpp_events_DT$df
df_NT_with_events <- gpp_events_NT$df
```

## Analysis of GPP after known events
### Analysis of GPP trajectory after 2017 events in Europe
Align the event data inspired by the example of Event alignment proposed on blog on Event detection with rgeco package. 
Find the explanation here: https://geco-bern.github.io/rgeco/articles/event_detection.html

Manual function to align events:
```{R}
align_frost_events_manual <- function(df, events, before = 7, after = 14) {
  
  df_clean <- df %>%
    select(-any_of(c("event_id", "dday", "partition")))
  
  events %>%
    select(
      event_id,
      site_id,
      event_year = year,
      start_date,
      end_date,
      Tmin_abs,
      summed_negative_temp
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      window_start = start_date - before,
      window_end = start_date + after
    ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      TIMESTAMP = list(seq.Date(window_start, window_end, by = "day"))
    ) %>%
    unnest(TIMESTAMP) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      idx_event = as.integer(TIMESTAMP - start_date)
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      df_clean,
      by = c("site_id", "TIMESTAMP")
    )
}
```

Align the event for DT and NT partioned GPP:
```{R}
aligned_DT_manual <- align_frost_events_manual(
  df = df_DT_with_events,
  events = events_DT,
  before = 7,
  after = 28
)

aligned_NT_manual <- align_frost_events_manual(
  df = df_NT_with_events,
  events = events_NT,
  before = 7,
  after = 28
)


```


Calculate DT/NT-GPP anomaly:
```{R}
aligned_DT_manual <- aligned_DT_manual %>%
  group_by(event_id) %>%
  mutate(
    GPP_DT_baseline = mean(
      GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos[idx_event >= -7 & idx_event <= -1],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    GPP_DT_anomaly_abs = GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos - GPP_DT_baseline,
    GPP_DT_anomaly_rel = (GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos - GPP_DT_baseline) / GPP_DT_baseline
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

aligned_NT_manual <- aligned_NT_manual %>%
  group_by(event_id) %>%
  mutate(
    GPP_NT_baseline = mean(
      GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos[idx_event >= -7 & idx_event <= -1],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    GPP_NT_anomaly_abs = GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos - GPP_NT_baseline,
    GPP_NT_anomaly_rel = (GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos - GPP_NT_baseline) / GPP_NT_baseline
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

Plot DT-/NT-GPP anomaly:
```{R}
plot_DT_2017_europe <- aligned_DT_manual %>%
  filter(
    event_year == 2017,
    !grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id)
  )

# plot absolute anomaly
ggplot(plot_DT_2017_europe,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_DT_anomaly_abs, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.35) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Absolute GPP anomaly",
    title = "Absolute DT GPP anomaly around frost events in Europe, 2017"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

# plot relative anomaly
ggplot(plot_DT_2017_europe,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_DT_anomaly_rel, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.35) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 3)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-1, 3, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Relative GPP anomaly",
    title = "Relative DT GPP anomaly around frost events in Europe, 2017"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

plot_NT_2017_europe <- aligned_NT_manual %>%
  filter(
    event_year == 2017,
    !grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id)
  )

# plot absolute anomaly
ggplot(plot_NT_2017_europe,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_NT_anomaly_abs, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.35) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Absolute GPP anomaly",
    title = "Absolute NT GPP anomaly around frost events in Europe, 2017"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

# plot relative anomaly
ggplot(plot_NT_2017_europe,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_NT_anomaly_rel, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.35) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 3)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-1, 3, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Relative GPP anomaly",
    title = "Relative NT GPP anomaly around frost events in Europe, 2017"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

Because GPP is not directly measured but derived from NEE by flux partitioning, event classification can differ between the nighttime and daytime partitioning products. Therefore, DT- and NT-based events were analysed separately and interpreted as a sensitivity of the GPP-based frost-event definition

Plot running mean DT GPP:
```{R}
plot_DT_2017_europe <- aligned_DT_manual %>%
  filter(
    event_year == 2017,
    !grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id),
    idx_event >= -7,
    idx_event <= 21
  )

ggplot(plot_DT_2017_europe,
       aes(x = idx_event,
           y = GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos,
           group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean GPP",
    title = "DT GPP trajectory around frost events in Europe, 2017",
    subtitle = "Thin lines = individual events, thick line = mean response"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

plot_NT_2017_europe <- aligned_NT_manual %>%
  filter(
    event_year == 2017,
    !grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id),
    idx_event >= -7,
    idx_event <= 21
  )

ggplot(plot_NT_2017_europe,
       aes(x = idx_event,
           y = GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos,
           group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean GPP",
    title = "NT GPP trajectory around frost events in Europe, 2017",
    subtitle = "Thin lines = individual events, thick line = mean response"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

### Analysis of GPP trajectory after 2012 events in north America
Plot DT-/NT-GPP anomaly north america:
```{R}
plot_DT_2012_america <- aligned_DT_manual %>%
  filter(
    event_year == 2012,
    grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id)
  )

# plot absolute anomaly
ggplot(plot_DT_2012_america,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_DT_anomaly_abs, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.35) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Absolute GPP anomaly",
    title = "Absolute DT GPP anomaly around frost events in North America, 2012"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

# plot relative anomaly
ggplot(plot_DT_2012_america,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_DT_anomaly_rel, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.35) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 3)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-1, 3, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Relative GPP anomaly",
    title = "Relative DT GPP anomaly around frost events in North America, 2012"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

plot_NT_2012_america <- aligned_NT_manual %>%
  filter(
    event_year == 2012,
    grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id)
  )

# plot absolute anomaly
ggplot(plot_NT_2012_america,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_NT_anomaly_abs, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.35) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Absolute GPP anomaly",
    title = "Absolute NT GPP anomaly around frost events in North America, 2012"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

# plot relative anomaly
ggplot(plot_NT_2012_america,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_NT_anomaly_rel, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.35) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 3)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-1, 3, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Relative GPP anomaly",
    title = "Relative NT GPP anomaly around frost events in North America, 2012"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

Plot running mean DT-/NT-GPP in north america:
```{R}
plot_DT_2012_america <- aligned_DT_manual %>%
  filter(
    event_year == 2012,
    grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id),
    idx_event >= -7,
    idx_event <= 21
  )

ggplot(plot_DT_2012_america,
       aes(x = idx_event,
           y = GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos,
           group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean GPP",
    title = "DT GPP trajectory around frost events in North America, 2012",
    subtitle = "Thin lines = individual events, thick line = mean response"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

plot_NT_2012_america <- aligned_NT_manual %>%
  filter(
    event_year == 2012,
    grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id),
    idx_event >= -7,
    idx_event <= 21
  )

ggplot(plot_NT_2012_america,
       aes(x = idx_event,
           y = GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos,
           group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ site_id) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean GPP",
    title = "NT GPP trajectory around frost events in North America, 2012",
    subtitle = "Thin lines = individual events, thick line = mean response"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

## Analysis of GPP after spring frost across all years per site
Plot relative anomaly of DT GPP after frost:
```{R}
plot_DT_all <- aligned_DT_manual %>%
  mutate(
    region = if_else(grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id), "North America", "Europe")
  )%>%
  filter(
    !is.na(event_id)
  )

# plot relative DT GPP anomaly
ggplot(plot_DT_all,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_DT_anomaly_rel, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.08) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.3
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 3)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-1, 3, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ region)+
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Relative GPP anomaly",
    title = "Pooled relative DT GPP anomaly around all frost events"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

plot_NT_all <- aligned_NT_manual %>%
  mutate(
    region = if_else(grepl("^(US|CA)", site_id), "North America", "Europe")
  )%>%
  filter(
    !is.na(event_id)
  )

# plot relative NT GPP anomaly
ggplot(plot_NT_all,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_NT_anomaly_rel, group = event_id)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.08) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(group = 1),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    linewidth = 1.3
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 3)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-1, 3, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ region)+
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Relative GPP anomaly",
    title = "Pooled relative NT GPP anomaly around all frost events"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

In the mean the relative anomaly stagnates for DT GPP and reduces slighly the first few days for the relative anomaly of NT GPP. But in the mean there is no trend of a negative relative anomaly. 

### Analyse if the GPP response is related to frost severity
```{R}
# analysis for DT GPP
events_DT <- events_DT %>%
  mutate(
    frost_class = case_when(
      Tmin_abs > -4 ~ "moderate",
      Tmin_abs > -10 ~ "strong",
      TRUE ~ "extreme"
    )
  )

aligned_DT_manual <- aligned_DT_manual %>%
  left_join(
    events_DT %>%
      select(event_id, frost_class),
    by = "event_id"
  )

ggplot(aligned_DT_manual,
       aes(idx_event, GPP_DT_anomaly_rel)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ frost_class)+
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.4, 1.4)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-0.4, 1.4, by = 0.2)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Relative DT GPP anomaly",
    title = "Relative DT GPP anomaly in dependence of frost severity"
  )

# analysis for NT GPP
events_NT <- events_NT %>%
  mutate(
    frost_class = case_when(
      Tmin_abs > -4 ~ "moderate",
      Tmin_abs > -10 ~ "strong",
      TRUE ~ "extreme"
    )
  )

aligned_NT_manual <- aligned_NT_manual %>%
  left_join(
    events_NT %>%
      select(event_id, frost_class),
    by = "event_id"
  )

ggplot(aligned_NT_manual,
       aes(idx_event, GPP_NT_anomaly_rel)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ frost_class) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.4, 1.4)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-0.4, 1.4, by = 0.2)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "Relative NT GPP anomaly",
    title = "Relative NT GPP anomaly in dependence of frost severity"
  )
```

Relative anomaly of DT GPP reaches up to -20% for extreme absolute negative temperatures. For moderate and strong absolute negative temperatures no negative relative DT GPP anomaly is observed. 
Relative anomaly of NT GPP shows strong reduction for extreme and still significant reduction for strong absolute negative temperatures. 

Analyse and Plot the running mean GPP in dependence of frost severity:
```{R}
# running mean DT GPP
ggplot(aligned_DT_manual,
       aes(idx_event, GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ frost_class) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean DT GPP",
    title = "DT GPP trajectory in dependence of frost severity"
  ) 

# running mean NT GPP
ggplot(aligned_NT_manual,
       aes(idx_event, GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ frost_class) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean NT GPP",
    title = "NT GPP trajectory in dependence of frost severity"
  )
```

Plotting the trailing mean of DT GPP for all three classes of frost severity a clear reduction is visible for extreme absolute negative temperatures for the first 5 days. For strong absolute temperatures there is also a slight reduction in the trailing mean DT GPP. 

Plotting the trailing mean of NT GPP for all three classes of frost severity a clear reduction is visible for extreme absolute negative temperatures for the first 10 days. For strong absolute temperatures there is also a clear reduction for the first 3-4 days.

### Analyse the impact of the GPP-Level before the frost event
Categorize events based on pre-event GPP:
```{R}
# calculate and plot for DT GPP
aligned_DT_manual <- aligned_DT_manual %>%
  mutate(
    activity_class = case_when(
      GPP_DT_baseline < 2 ~ "low",
      GPP_DT_baseline < 5 ~ "medium",
      TRUE ~ "high"
    )
  )

ggplot(aligned_DT_manual,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ activity_class) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean DT GPP",
    title = "DT GPP trajectory in dependence of pre-frost GPP activity"
  )

# calculate and plot for NT GPP
aligned_NT_manual <- aligned_NT_manual %>%
  mutate(
    activity_class = case_when(
      GPP_NT_baseline < 2 ~ "low",
      GPP_NT_baseline < 5 ~ "medium",
      TRUE ~ "high"
    )
  )

ggplot(aligned_NT_manual,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ activity_class) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean NT GPP",
    title = "NT GPP trajectory in dependence of pre-frost GPP activity"
  )
```

For DT GPP there is a decrease in trailing GPP for high base level GPP. But for some reason the peak is before the event and then the lowest is when the event hits. 
For NT GPP there is a decrease in all cases, but the decrease is most significant for high base level GPP. 

```{R}
# for DT GPP
qs_DT <- quantile(aligned_DT_manual$GPP_DT_baseline,
         probs = c(0.5, 0.75),
         na.rm = TRUE)
q1_DT <- qs_DT[1]
q2_DT <- qs_DT[2]

aligned_DT_manual <- aligned_DT_manual %>%
  mutate(
    activity_class = case_when(
      GPP_DT_baseline < q1_DT ~ "low",
      GPP_DT_baseline < q2_DT ~ "medium",
      TRUE ~ "high"
    )
  )
ggplot(aligned_DT_manual,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ activity_class) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean DT GPP",
    title = "DT GPP trajectory in dependence of pre-frost GPP activity"
  )

# for NT GPP
qs_NT <- quantile(
  aligned_NT_manual$GPP_NT_baseline,
  probs = c(0.5, 0.75),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

q1_NT <- qs_NT[1]
q2_NT <- qs_NT[2]

aligned_NT_manual <- aligned_NT_manual %>%
  mutate(
    activity_class = case_when(
      GPP_NT_baseline < q1_NT ~ "low",
      GPP_NT_baseline < q2_NT ~ "medium",
      TRUE ~ "high"
    )
  )
ggplot(aligned_NT_manual,
       aes(x = idx_event, y = GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ activity_class) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Days relative to frost event start",
    y = "4-day trailing mean DT GPP",
    title = "NT GPP trajectory in dependence of pre-frost GPP activity"
  )
```

For the 75% quantile the trailing DT and NT GPP reduced due to frost event. 

### Analysis based on vegetation type and based on koeppen climate code
**TO-DO!**
